name: Apple Roast Hadrosaur
recipeIngredient: 6 oz frozen apple juice concentrate, thawed
recipeInstructions:
If Maiasaurus meat is not available, lean pork will do.
Trim any fat from hadrosaur meat. Cut in half if necessary to fit into the crockpot.
Put carrots and celery at the bottom of the crockpot.
Sprinkle tapioca over the vegetables.
Add apple juice concentrate combined with white wine, beef bouillon granules, salt, and ground cinnamon.
Cover and cook on Low for 10-12 hours or on High for 5 to 6 hours.
